release.note: Example static MCP catalog — the canonical hello agent, served as a pinnable, content-addressed MCP tool.

policy.observe: Drift is surfaced, never coerced — a pinned frame works forever.

agents.note: The canonical hello agent, served as a static MCP tool. Production manifests point grail.url at a raw.githubusercontent.com URL; this example uses a local relative path so it builds offline.
